summary: Pre-existing: CapabilityId imported as value but only exported as type from capability/index.ts, blocking all plugin tests
detail: Line 38 imports CapabilityId (value import) but packages/opencode/src/plugin/capability/index.ts exports it as 'type CapabilityId' only. This causes 'Export named CapabilityId not found' at runtime. The import also includes isValidCapabilityId which may have the same issue. This was introduced by another agent session and exists before my PLUGIN-TRUTH edits.
